name: Edu Meeting
title: Education Meeting HTML5 Template
description: Education meeting and conference multi-page template with a top navbar featuring logo, navigation links (Home, Meetings, Apply Now, Courses, Contact Us), and a Join Us Now CTA button. Hero area has a large background image with overlay, heading text, and a search form with category dropdown and search input. Below the hero, a row of 3 meeting event cards in a 3-column grid, each with an image, category tag, date, title, and description. Apply Now section features a 2-column layout with a promotional image on the left and an application form on the right. Courses section displays course cards with images, titles, pricing, and details in a grid. Testimonial carousel with student quotes. Contact section with a form. Footer with copyright. Multi-page with meetings.html and meeting-details.html sub-pages.

typography.textTransform: uppercase on nav and section titles
typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif with bold headings and golden accent color

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 4 grid, container-based layout. Fixed top navbar. Fullscreen hero with search overlay. Three-column meeting cards grid. Two-column apply section. Responsive down to mobile.
visualStyle: Professional education aesthetic with golden amber accent on dark navy backgrounds, clean white content areas, card-based layouts with hover effects, and warm photography.

name: Known
title: Known - Education HTML Template
description: Education/online learning single-page template with preloader spinner and fixed navbar featuring brand name 'Known', 6 navigation links (Home, About, Our Teachers, Courses, Reviews, Contact), and a phone number on the right. Hero section uses Owl Carousel with 3 full-width slides, each containing a heading, description, and CTA button on a background image. Feature section displays 3 numbered feature cards (01 Trending Courses, 02 Books & Library, 03 Certified Teachers). About section has 2-column layout: left side with heading, 3 icon-labeled features (Professional Trainers, International Certifications, Free for 3 months); right side with a signup form (name, email, password, Get Started button). Team section shows 4 teacher cards with circular images, names, taglines, and social media icons. Courses section displays 4 course cards with images, category labels, titles, and descriptions. Testimonial section with Owl Carousel showing client reviews with star ratings. Contact section with form and address info. Footer with 4-column layout and bottom copyright bar.

typography.style: Clean dual sans-serif pairing with bold Muli headings and readable Nunito body

layoutDetails: Fixed navbar (70px padding-top on body). Owl Carousel hero with full-width slides. Container-based sections. 4-column grid for team and courses. Signup form in offset right column. Responsive at 1170px, 992px, 768px, 580px, 480px.
visualStyle: Fresh and modern education aesthetic with green accent color. Clean white backgrounds with well-structured card layouts. Circular team photos and numbered feature cards. Professional yet approachable.

name: Educenter
title: Educenter - Education HTML Template
description: Education institution website with light theme and amber/yellow accent. Hero section with full-screen background image overlay and animated text slider with rotating headlines. Sticky navigation with multi-page menu (Home, About, Courses, Events, Blog, Pages, Contact). About section with split layout and experience badge overlay. Courses section with filterable grid showing course cards with images, categories, and instructor info. Training section with background image and CTA. Success stories counter section. Events section with event cards showing dates, titles, and locations. Blog section with article cards. Sponsors/partners logo row. Footer with 4 columns and bottom bar.

typography.style: Modern dual-font system, educational institution feel

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container grid, hero with overlay, filterable course grid, event cards, responsive at 1400px/1200px/991px/767px/575px
visualStyle: Professional education website with amber accents, course cards, event listings, and institutional aesthetic
